msg: Correlation watchdog fires on every rebalance with 6 crypto assets
fix: Expected behaviour — not an error. Position scalar = 0.60 applied. To reduce: raise threshold to 0.92 in risk_overrides or expand universe beyond 6 assets.

msg: OKX rejects swap orders when account is in long_short_mode instead of net_type
fix: Run once: okx --profile demo account set-position-mode net  (then use --posSide net in all orders, NOT long/short)

msg: sz parameter must be in contracts, not coin quantity

context.symptom: Order size too small or incorrect position size

fix: sz = max(1, round(coin_qty / contract_size)). BTC: 0.01 BTC = 1 contract. Never pass raw coin amounts.

msg: ccxt OKX client returns 50101 APIKey does not match current environment on authenticated calls

context.root_cause: Demo account keys require x-simulated-trading: 1 header

fix: After creating ccxt.okx exchange: exchange.headers['x-simulated-trading'] = '1'  This is done automatically in engine/execution/broker.py when sandbox=True

msg: ccxt calls fetch_currencies() during load_markets() hitting private endpoint that fails on restricted keys
fix: After creating exchange object: exchange.has['fetchCurrencies'] = False  This prevents ccxt from calling the private currencies endpoint. Already applied in engine/execution/broker.py create_exchange()

msg: okx CLI binary not found on PATH
--profile flag must come immediately after okx, before module name
fetch_universe returns 0 bars because cache ends before requested date range
fix: Cache auto-refreshes if cache_end < requested_end - 2 days. Fixed in data/fetcher.py fetch_ohlcv(). If still failing, pass use_cache=False to force re-fetch.

msg: BacktestRunner metrics show CAGR = 0% even when total return is non-zero

context.root_cause: Known bug in compute_all_metrics annualisation period calculation

fix: OPEN — raw total return is correct. Use total_return_pct for competition planning, not cagr_pct. Fix pending in backtest/metrics.py

msg: Claude-native setup complete
ATK --json returns a raw list, not {data:[...]} wrapper

context.fix: Handle both: raw = data if isinstance(data, list) else data.get("data", [{}])

msg: OKX API returns empty string '' for numeric fields when no value (e.g. adjEq, upl when no open positions)

context.fix: Use helper: def _f(v, default=0.0): return float(v) if v != "" else default. Never use float() directly on OKX numeric fields.

msg: ~/.okx/config.toml credentials must be under [profiles.demo], not [demo]

context.fix: Correct format: [profiles.demo] with fields api_key, secret_key, passphrase, demo=true. Also ensure demo=true is inside [profiles.demo], not root level.
